case_title: TARYN WEISBERG VS. FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISBERG, TARYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE $915.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.00, JUDGMENT INCLUDES $390.88 RADIATOR, $80.00 COOLANT/3-WAY VALVE, $147.20 ORIGINAL FIRESTONE WORK, $97.72 UBER, AND $200.00 FOR TWO DAYS LOSS OF USE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF TARYN WEISBERG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT GOMEZ, STORE MANAGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED APR-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-17-22)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,224.26 FILED BY WEISBERG, TARYN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROBERTO GOMEZ, STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEISBERG, TARYN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESTONE COMPLETE AUTOCARE
